alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.description: Configure and manage alerts for monitoring

empty.title: No alerts yet
empty.description: Monitor important events in your project and get notified when something needs your attention.

deleteSingle.title: Delete alert
deleteSingle.description: Are you sure you want to delete this alert? This action cannot be undone.

deleteBatch.title: Delete alerts
deleteBatch.description: Are you sure you want to delete these alerts? This action cannot be undone.

unsavedChanges.title: You have unsaved changes
unsavedChanges.description: If you leave now, your changes will be lost. Are you sure you want to continue?

fields.name: Name
fields.enabledDescription: Enable to send automatic notifications to the specified URL for selected events.

webhook.title: Webhook settings
webhook.description: Configure how the platform sends notifications to your system.
webhook.routingKeyDescription: PagerDuty routing key for an integration on a service or on a global ruleset
webhook.endpointUrlDescription: Destination URL where the platform will send webhook notifications. This endpoint should be active and able to receive and process incoming POST requests.
webhook.secretTokenDescription: Add to securely verify that incoming webhook requests come from the platform.

headers.label: Headers (optional)
headers.description: Specify custom HTTP headers to include with each webhook request. Use them for authentication, content type specification, or any other required metadata.

triggers.title: Triggers
triggers.description: Choose which platform events will trigger the alert.
triggers.emptyDescription: Choose one or more events to decide when this webhook should be activated

feedbackConditions.cantRemove: Can't remove — every alert needs at least one group with at least one condition.

payloadExample.noExample: No example available for this event type

testWebhook.title: Test alert configuration
testWebhook.description: Send a test notification to your configured endpoint to verify that the webhook is set up correctly and receiving events as expected.
testWebhook.routingKeyRequired: Routing key is required for PagerDuty integration

trace_errors.title: Trace errors threshold
trace_errors.description: Triggered when the number of trace errors exceeds the specified threshold in selected projects.

trace_guardrails_triggered.title: Guardrail triggered
trace_guardrails_triggered.description: Triggered when a guardrail event occurs in any trace within the selected projects.

trace_feedback_score.title: Trace feedback score threshold
trace_feedback_score.description: Triggered when the average feedback score for traces exceeds the specified threshold in selected projects.

trace_thread_feedback_score.title: Thread feedback score threshold
trace_thread_feedback_score.description: Triggered when the average feedback score for threads exceeds the specified threshold in selected projects.

prompt_created.title: New prompt added
prompt_created.description: Triggered when a new prompt is created or saved in the workspace's prompt library.

prompt_committed.title: New prompt version created
prompt_committed.description: Triggered when a new commit (version) is added to any prompt in the workspace's prompt library.

prompt_deleted.title: Prompt deleted
prompt_deleted.description: Triggered when a prompt is removed from the workspace's prompt library.

experiment_finished.title: Experiment finished
experiment_finished.description: Triggered when an experiment completes in the workspace.

trace_cost.title: Cost threshold
trace_cost.description: Triggered when total trace cost exceeds the specified threshold in the selected projects.

trace_latency.title: Latency threshold
trace_latency.description: Triggered when average trace latency exceeds the specified threshold in the selected projects.

validation.routingKeyRequired: Routing key is required for PagerDuty integration
